messages.content: how to make antDesign divider dark themed?
display items on the same line using css

To display items on the same line using CSS, you can use the `display: inline` property. Here are two ways to achieve this: 1. Using the inline property on each item individually: ``` .item { display: inline; } ``` ```
Item 1 Item 2 Item 3
``` This will display each item as an inline element and place them on the same line. You can adjust spacing between items using margin or padding, if needed. 2. Using the inline property with a container element: ``` .container { display: flex; } .item { display: inline; } ``` ```
Item 1 Item 2 Item 3
``` This will use `display: flex` on the container element to display the items on the same line. Each item will be an inline element within the flex container. You can also adjust spacing and alignment using flex properties, such as `justify-content` and `align-items`.
make the button, the title, the button on the same line using antDesign

this is my code and it's not on the same line "<Row style={{ display: 'flex', justifyContent: 'space-between', alignItems: 'center' }} align="middle">
                        <Col style={{ display: 'inline' }}>
                            <Button
                            type="text"
                            icon={collapsed ? <MenuOutlined /> : <CloseOutlined />}
                            onClick={() => setCollapsed(!collapsed)}
                            style={{
                                fontSize: '16px',
                                width: 64,
                                height: 64,
                                color: '#95A1F9',
                            }}
                        />
                            <Title style={{ color: 'white', paddingTop: '10px' }} level={3}>CryptoTasky</Title>
                        </Col>
                        <Col style={{ display: 'inline' }}>
                            <Button style={{ backgroundColor: '#95A1F9', fontWeight: 'bold' }} type="primary" shape="round" icon={<LoginOutlined />} size={size}>
                                تسجيل
                            </Button>
                        </Col>
                    </Row>"
